Author: Maateria
Name: XIVSchAssitant
Description: Automatic Scholar assistant: summons Eos on login, instance entry, and after wipes; repositions her to the arena center in 8-player raids; plays an alert when Biolysis falls off; and shows a countdown overlay when Chain Stratagem is coming off cooldown. Manual override: if you place Eos yourself during a fight, auto-repositioning pauses and a draggable button appears on screen to send her back to center on demand. Use /xivsch to open settings.
Punchline: Scholar assistant: auto Eos summon/placement, manual override with return button, Biolysis alert, Chain Stratagem countdown.
